meta.title: ARAHNETS — Realizing Seamless Digital Payments · EDC Terminals · Rental · Field Services · Software
meta.desc: ARAHNETS is an Ingenico-certified payment technology partner since 2006 — EDC terminal procurement, rental, field maintenance and terminal software development for enterprises across Indonesia.
hero.sub: ARAHNETS procures, rents, maintains and programs EDC terminal fleets for enterprises that cannot afford a failed transaction. One certified partner — from purchase order to production.
cred.label: [ 01 ] — CREDENTIALS
cred.statement:
Certified by Ingenico.
Operating since 2006.
Trusted where a failed
transaction is not an option
cred.lede: Certification is not a badge to us — it is an operating standard. Two decades of procurement discipline, field rigor and terminal-level engineering, audited against the hardware we deploy.
svc.label: [ 02 ] — CAPABILITIES
svc.title:
Four modules.
One payment stack
svc.sub: Not a menu of services — an integrated stack. Each module runs standalone or as part of a fully managed terminal estate.
svc1.title: Terminal EDC
svc1.desc: Procurement and provisioning of certified Ingenico terminal fleets — sourced, configured, key-injected and delivered deployment-ready to every branch, counter and courier.
svc2.title: EDC Rental
svc2.desc: Rental programs that flex with your volume — seasonal peaks, events, pilots or full estates. Managed devices, managed swaps, one predictable line item.
svc3.title: Field Services
svc3.tagline: Uptime is a discipline, not a promise.
svc3.desc: Preventive maintenance, corrective repair and first-line response across the estate — technicians, spare-part logistics and swap stock engineered around your SLA.
svc4.title: Software Development
svc4.tagline: The terminal is a platform. We program it.
svc4.desc: Custom EDC applications built directly on the terminal OS — payment flows, host integration, loyalty, QR and remote update pipelines shipped to thousands of devices at once.
proof.label: [ 03 ] — PROOF
proof.title: Measured, not marketed
proof.m1d: Continuous operation since 2006 — through every network migration and card-scheme mandate.
proof.m2d: Procured, provisioned and delivered into production across the archipelago.
proof.m3d: Banking, retail, F&B, fuel, logistics, hospitality and more — one estate standard.
proof.m4d: Field-serviced availability across managed estates, measured monthly.
proc.label: [ 04 ] — PATHWAY
proc.title:
From inquiry
to infrastructure
proc.sub: A deployment is not a delivery — it is a sequence. Every ARAHNETS engagement runs the same engineered pathway.
proc.s1d: We scope the estate: transaction volume, acquirer relationships, sites, connectivity and SLA targets. You get a fleet design, not a quotation template.
proc.s2d: Terminals are sourced, configured and key-injected under certified handling. Profiles are pre-staged per acquirer so devices arrive transaction-ready.
proc.s3d: Nationwide rollout with on-site installation, merchant training and first-transaction verification at every point of acceptance.
proc.s4d: The estate goes under management: preventive maintenance cycles, corrective response, spare logistics and remote software updates — for the life of the fleet.
sw.label: [ 05 ] — SOFTWARE
sw.title:
We don't just deploy terminals.
We program them
sw.lede: Most providers stop at the hardware. ARAHNETS builds the application layer — the payment flows, host links and update pipelines that turn a device into infrastructure.
sw.f1d: Every terminal, every transaction, one console — health, volume and version state in real time.
sw.f2d: ISO 8583 authorization against acquirer hosts and national switching — QRIS, debit, credit, multi-acquirer routing.
sw.f3d: Signed builds staged and pushed to thousands of terminals overnight — no trucks, no downtime windows.
net.label: [ 06 ] — PARTNERS & CLIENTS
net.title:
One network.
Every sector that transacts
net.sub: Acquiring banks, switching networks and enterprise merchants run on estates we deploy and keep alive.
net.canvas: Constellation of client sectors connected to ARAHNETS
cta.label: [ 07 ] — DEPLOY
cta.title: Let's deploy
cta.sub: Tell us the size of your fleet. We'll handle everything between purchase order and production — and keep it running after.
